Belt of the Four Winds  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: WAIST
AC: 5

SV MAGIC: +5

WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Slot: WAIST
AC: 5
STR: +12 DEX: +6 STA: +12 AGI: +6

Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No

Source:Live

Page Updated:Fri Jun 29th, 2018

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Ultra Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Warrior Test of Think

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Sky


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 03 2002 at 5:03 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I don't care if it takes 2 years and 10,000 PoA raids, I will get this item or die (probably alot) trying. This is a sweet belt. Probably one of the best items I've seen in the game so far.

Belt 411
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2001 at 10:43 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591764554486
22 posts
Davan on Ayone Ro has one (dont look at me, wasnt my doing), but the belt is extremely rare. Maybe one or two per server on average. But there was a statement made (no idea when or who, im not a computer here ppl) declairing the PoA belts were being adjusted, and that they would be made the highest lvl haste items available (at the time). Which would put it above CoF, RBB, FBSS (=p), etc... Since they required multiple feats that were astounding if accomplished (at the time). They are still insanely great belts and are still as rare as they were before, the only thing that has chanegd is the lvl of the people cursing at the drop rates on Bzzazzt and the Noble.
And if you have ever tried completing the quest for this belt, dont even TRY to tell me that killing Nagafen is comparable to all the mobs that must be killed for this quest. Does Nagafen DT ? ... no... didnt think so, Spiroc Lord does, are theyre 3 Nagafens who split into multiples after being killed ? no... does nagafen have 2 lvl 60 guards who are unmezzable ? ... <shocked> nope... not that either... So if you question the haste on this belt, and the risk/reward of the item... <scoff> attempt the quest... and learn.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 26 2001 at 2:19 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i hear its 41% and its the best haste item in game but iam not to sure tho but 50% does not sound rigth (to much)
stupid
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2001 at 9:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248252821
8 posts
Whoever thinks this stack with the CoF has their nuts in their eyes, you can have one permanent haste item on ie: CoF, FBSS BoFW u get the idea, then you can have one SPELL type haste ie: all chanter haste spells and chanter epic proc, bard songs, Eyepatch of Plunder.... that is the only way haste can be stacked, no two permanents, no two spells, if you have two permanents on, the faster one with stick, if you have two spells on, the faster one will stick, abd you can only have two haste items/spells.... CoF and Eye Patch of Plunder... BoFW and Eye Patch of Plunder... Enchanter Epic Proc and Cof... You get the idea? good, i hope, glad i probably enlightened some stupiees out there :DDD
▲ Page top
RE: stupid
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2004 at 8:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788077815
34 posts
there is bard songs that also let you go over the haste cap and stack with spell haste and perm haste
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 07 2001 at 5:32 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) It is believed to be at 40-50% haste, I myself don not have nor have I seen 1. I have heard that the haste on it is faster than a CoF. For all you n00bs who think it stacks with other haste items you are wrong. It will only stack with a Eyepatch of Plunder or any clickable haste items or a chanter/shammy haste buff, not a CoF or any other permenent haste item. I would love to have this but I doubt I will ever get it. I recently lost a roll for a CoF and will probably quit EQ, since I am a lvl 53 warrior still in Crafted. If you want to take me to Hate and get me some Indi, Leave a post:P
Stackable Item Haste?
QuoteReply
# May 28 2001 at 8:05 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
What is all this crap about stackable Item haste? Has anyone bothered to test this or are you just talking smack? I would like to hear from someone that has tried it. 46% belt plus CoF at 35% would be insane item haste. I would like confirmation.
▲ Page top
RE: Stackable Item Haste?
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2002 at 3:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780137238
View User Forum
13 posts
actually now it is

item haste + spell haste + Bard Song Haste

the only way it can be stacked.
▲ Page top
RE: Stackable Item Haste?
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2001 at 6:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750188868
30 posts
No haste items stack. No haste spells or songs stack. You can only ever have one haste item and one haste spell affecting your attack speed.

That means, if you have 2 haste items, only the fastest one will affect you. If you don't believe me, take the slow one off and see if you're slower. You won't be.

That also means, only one haste spell or song will affect you. If you get Shissar and then some bard starts singing to you, you won't get any faster. You may get other effects from the song (like str or AC), but your haste will not be affected.

Note that some items have spell haste on them - like the Eyepatch of Plunder and the Monk Epic. The way you tell is, if you have to click it to activate the effect, it's spell haste. If it shows a little buff icon, it's spell haste. Otherwise, it's item haste.

Summary: you can only ever have 2 haste effects: one item haste, and one spell/song haste.

Hope that's clear :-)

Glencannon.
▲ Page top
RE: Stackable Item Haste?
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2003 at 3:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592256025535
96 posts
aye for the most part thats true but the enchanter spell SOV or speed of vallon stacks with my self haste spell i get off my eye patch of plunder
▲ Page top
RE: Stackable Item Haste?
QuoteReply
# May 19 2002 at 11:25 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592759310982
21 posts
Actually, while what you said is true, for the most part. There are SOME bard songs that have their own catagory. IE: haste is:
item + spell/song + special song

the special song are the ervaj line.. they are 5% and 10% (in order of level received) haste, that stack with song hastes. There is also battle cry of the vahsir, and warcry of the vahsir.. those are also songs which stack with other hastes songs.
▲ Page top
